summary: Diff shows a new `backend/migration.mo` module and partial changes in `backend/main.mo` (notably capturing `priorProfile` in `saveCallerUserProfile`). The diff snippet does not show any changes to `getHeartbeatData` or `fetchSignals`, and the `saveCallerUserProfile` botIdIndex update/removal logic is not visible in the truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update `backend/main.mo` `getHeartbeatData(accountId)` to return real, non-hardcoded data derived from canister state (botStatus/lastHeartbeatAt from botProfiles+uplinkStatus; verifiedLicense from userProfiles.accountId + licenses.active; cycles=0 with exact TODO comment if no API; cyclesWarning threshold behavior), without modifying other public endpoints.
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the provided `backend/main.mo` diff excerpt that `getHeartbeatData` was added/modified or that the required state-derived fields, cycles TODO comment, or cyclesWarning logic were implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Harden `fetchSignals()` success-path audit logging to avoid traps when creating the response snippet (<=100 full body else first 100 chars), keep `#ok({ statusCode; body; timestamp })` with timestamp from `Time.now()`, and keep existing #err behaviors/messages unchanged.
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the provided `backend/main.mo` diff excerpt that `fetchSignals` was modified, that the structured ok payload is returned as specified, or that bounds-safe snippet logic and required audit-log prefix were implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix `saveCallerUserProfile` bot-id indexing so `botIdIndex` removes previous `bot_id` mapping when changed/cleared and adds/overwrites mapping when new `bot_id` is set, while keeping signature/access control unchanged.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows `priorProfile` is captured before overwriting `userProfiles`, but the required follow-up logic (remove old mapping when bot_id changes or becomes null; add new mapping when present) is not shown in the truncated excerpt, so implementation cannot be confirmed.
evidence: backend/main.mo (shows `let priorProfile = userProfiles.get(caller);` and `userProfiles.add(caller, profile);` but truncates before any `botIdIndex` updates)

hallucinated_features.description: Added a new backend migration module (`backend/migration.mo`) and wired it into `backend/main.mo` via `import Migration "migration";` and `(with migration = Migration.run)`.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not request adding a migration module or enabling migration wiring; it also constrains backend changes to what is necessary for `getHeartbeatData`, `fetchSignals` robustness, and `saveCallerUserProfile` botIdIndex correctness.
